triggers.message: Modified loop scripts? `/ai-loop-test` validates shell plumbing without any AI calls or network access
Changes to loop infrastructure? `/ai-loop-test` sanity-checks it before merging
Loop stalled — same story repeated without progress. Run `cat .claude/state/loop-diagnostics.jsonl | jq .` to see iteration details, then fix the blocker before restarting `/ai-loop`
No agent context file found — run `/check-agent-readiness` to audit this repo
Long session — `/checkpoint` saves progress for safe resumption
Extended session — `/compliance-check` to validate patterns and complexity
Heavy React edits — `/compliance-check` to verify skill compliance
Consider `/create-commit` to checkpoint your work
No active plan — `/create-plan` structures your work into trackable stories
All changes committed — `/create-pr` generates a structured pull request
Have staged learnings ready to promote? `/create-skill` scaffolds a new skill from toolkit patterns
Discovering reusable patterns this session? `/create-skill` formalizes them into a loadable skill
Long session with no TODO tracking — `/create-todo` to capture items for later
You have open TODOs — `/next` to prioritize or `/create-todo` to add more
Multiple projects may have pending work -- `/dashboard` for a cross-project view
Editing React components? `/debug-browser` captures console errors and network failures live from the app
UI issues to investigate? `/debug-browser` opens an interactive browser session to capture runtime errors
Many edits to the same area — `/debug` offers structured hypothesis-driven debugging
Feature looking solid? `/deploy` for a Vercel preview URL
Uncommitted changes from last session — commit and `/deploy` when ready
Migration files detected — `/deploy` runs migration safety checks before deploying
Edited React components — `/design-check` validates design system compliance
Large AI-assisted session — `/deslop` to remove unnecessary comments and defensive code
Many component edits — `/deslop` to clean up AI-generated patterns before committing
Added or changed features? `/docs-check` audits CLAUDE.md and README.md for drift vs actual files
Working on features? `/docs-check` catches phantom entries and undocumented items before they ship
Lots of UI changes? `/dogfood` runs systematic QA with screenshots and repro evidence
Major changes in flight — `/dogfood` exploratory-tests the running app to catch bugs before PR
Staged learnings ready for review — `/evolve` proposes promotions to permanent rules
New to the toolkit? Run `/guide` for a quick orientation.
Need help finding commands? Try `/guide`.
No CLAUDE.md found — `/init` generates one from a template for this project type
Incomplete plan found — run `/iterate` to continue
No project context loaded — run `/kickoff` to initialize the session
Long session — `/learn` to extract reusable patterns before context clears
Staged learnings from last session — run `/learn` or `/evolve` to promote them
Using a toolkit skill heavily this session? `/log-skill` records it to ~/.ai/events.jsonl for PAOPAIA tracking
Memory entries piling up? `/memory-clean` archives old entries (default 30 days) to keep context lean
Long-running project? `/memory-clean` prunes stale memory so future sessions load faster
Consider `/mode` to optimize your workflow (dev, review, debug, deploy, research, orchestrate)
Running parallel agents? `/monitor` launches a TUI dashboard to track all active sessions
Have agents running? `/monitor` shows real-time progress across all worktrees
Large plan to execute? `/multitask` runs parallel agents on isolated worktrees for concurrent development
Complex session — `/multitask` can parallelize independent features across worktrees
Have TODOs or open issues — `/next` to see what to work on
Not sure what to tackle? `/next` suggests your top priorities
Ready to execute a plan at scale? `/orchestrate` spawns parallel agents to tackle it concurrently
Working on a big feature? `/orchestrate` can split it across parallel worktree agents
Plan with dependent tasks? `/pipeline` executes them as a DAG with parallel dispatch and checkpointing
Many changes in flight — `/pipeline` can orchestrate complex multi-step workflows with resume support
Editing shared files? `/plan-status` shows file claims and detects conflicts across active plans
Multiple plans active? `/plan-status` checks for file ownership conflicts before you start
Working without a plan? `/plan` breaks the feature into dependency-ordered tasks
Many edits with no plan — `/plan` to scope the work before continuing
Ready to commit? `/pre-commit-check` verifies coverage, techdebt, and docs first
TypeScript changes ready — `/pre-commit-check` before committing
Many uncommitted changes — `/pre-pr-check` validates before PR
React component edits — `/rams` for accessibility + visual design audit
Deep into the session — `/remind` for a quick recap of goals and progress
Many uncommitted edits — `/review` to catch issues before committing
Multiple component edits — `/review` for accessibility + quality check
Lots of back-and-forth — `/scrap` to discard and restart with a cleaner approach
Many edits without a clean commit — `/scrap` if the current approach isn't working
Multiple source file edits — `/security-check` to scan for vulnerabilities
Significant changes — `/security-check --owasp` for OWASP Top 10 audit before PR
Many edits since last commit — `/status` to review progress
Mid-session — `/status` for a quick progress check
Uncommitted changes from a previous session — `/status --history` to see what happened
Active plan with pending stories — `/status --history` for a session summary
Large project with no pyramid summaries — `/summarize` generates multi-level context for leaner sessions
Deep into a codebase? `/summarize` captures multi-resolution snapshots to keep future sessions lean
Lots of completed tasks? `/tasks-cleanup` archives them to keep the list tidy
Task list getting long? `/tasks-cleanup` removes archived tasks so current work stays visible
Editing tests — `/tdd` structures red-green-refactor cycles
Large changeset — `/techdebt` to check for duplication before committing
Context growing large — `/token-budget` to check which toolkit components are heaviest
Long session — `/token-budget` to verify context costs before continuing
Starting a new project session — `/update-toolkit` to pull the latest toolkit improvements
UI components changed — `/verify-visual` to catch rendering issues with screenshots
Styles changed — `/verify-visual` for visual regression check
Verify changes with `/verify`
New session — `/version` to confirm which toolkit version is active
Starting feature work? `/worktree` creates an isolated branch with deps + env symlinks pre-configured
Working on a new feature? `/worktree` isolates it from main so experiments stay clean
Long session — consider `/wrap-up` to capture learnings before ending
